title: Rin's Fortress
description: A mod adding more defensive options to BTA. (Better Than Adventure)
body:
# **Rin's Fortress Mod for BTA**
**(Formerly known as Better with Defense)**

**A mod that aims to add more defensive options to the player in BTA!**

## **Preview**
![A player holding modded items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf93e62c8e96a52b1c7ffa5101730bde273c6bdd.png)

### **Dependencies**
- [PrismaticLibe](<https://modrinth.com/mod/prismaticlibe/versions>) >= 4.1.2 (Outdated for 7.2)
- [HalpLibe](<https://modrinth.com/mod/halplibe/versions>) >= 4.1.3

#### **Credits**
- [Useless](<https://modrinth.com/user/UselessBullets7695>) - mod help

##### Disclaimer
This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3! For more information, join the discord server provided on this projects page.
